selected_candidate:
Phantoscope Memory Foam Pillow for Sleeping, Shredded Memory Foam Pillow Cooling Gel for Hot Sleepers, Adjustable Firm Bed Pillows with Bamboo Cover & Cotton Cover, King Size, 1 Pack, Gift Package
constraint_evidence:
- bamboo memory foam pillow: supported by action/title context (“Bamboo Cover” + Memory Foam Pillow)
- washable cover: supported by visible left filter “Washable”; cover itself not explicitly shown as washable in product card
- king size: supported by action/title context (“King Size”) and visible “Options: 3 sizes” (king not directly visible)
- on Amazon: supported
- available: supported by presence of purchasable search result
- price visible: supported (“VND 964,514”)
- rating visible: supported (“4.3” and “(1.1K)”)
- product is memory foam: supported
- bamboo cover specifically visible: not_visible in screenshot text, only in action/title context
- washable cover specifically on this item: not_visible
- exact king-size variant selected: not_visible
action_target:
Click the Phantoscope product result link/span.
success_signals:
Product detail page opens for the Phantoscope pillow, ideall

observation.title: Amazon.com: King Size Pillow - Washable / Memory Foam / Bamboo / Memory Foam

evidence.claim: The trace ultimately reaches a product detail page for the Phantoscope pillow on Amazon.
The selected product is a memory foam pillow with bamboo cover in king size, matching most of the task intent.

The high-detail screenshot text shows 'Washable' as a filter and 'King Size' in the action/title context, but the evidence does not explicitly confirm that the chosen product itself has a washable cover or that the king-size variant was definitively selected.
No visible error banner or modal appears in the digested steps leading to the final product page.

args.expected_behavior: Reach an Amazon product page or search result that clearly satisfies bamboo, memory foam, washable cover, and king size constraints.
args.actual_behavior: The run navigates to a Phantoscope Amazon product page whose title and context support bamboo memory foam and king size, but the available evidence does not clearly verify that the selected item's cover is washable.
args.regression_rule: Do not mark a run successful for this task unless the final selected Amazon product is explicitly evidenced to satisfy all requested constraints, especially washable cover and king size variant.

suggested_followups.label: Inspect step 23 in detail
suggested_followups.message: Show the high-detail evidence for the Phantoscope selection and whether washable/king-size are explicitly confirmed.

suggested_followups.label: Compare with a successful run
suggested_followups.message: Find a validated successful run for the same task and compare how it confirmed washable cover and king size.
